package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Chhattisgarh Tour Package — Tribal Heritage Trail • Sirpur • Jagdalpur • Bastar Heartland

highlights.text: Serial code CG-006 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-CG-THT-006
State / Country: Chhattisgarh / India | Category: Premium Tribal Heritage Tour
Ideal for: Families, Cultural Explorers & Heritage Connoisseurs
Best season: October to March (Pleasant forest canopies)
Starting price: On Request (Premium Luxury Tier)
Vehicle: Private AC Luxury SUV (Innova Crysta) | Meal Plan: Premium MAPAI
Route Plan: Raipur (1N) ➔ Sirpur ➔ Jagdalpur / Bastar (3N) ➔ Chitrakote (1N) ➔ Raipur Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Scholar-led Sirpur walks and private sunset boat cruise at Chitrakote.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Hands-on lost-wax metal modeling with royal tribal masters.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: 4-tier properties from Babylon Inn to Bastar Palace Royal Suite.
Shopping: Dhonkra art, Tussar silk, organic forest honey, terracotta crafts.
Important Notes: Conservative attire at temples; book 45–60 days ahead for Chitrakote riverside huts.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Chhattisgarh Tour Package — Tribal Heritage Trail • Sirpur • Jagdalpur • Bastar Heartland
itinerary.tagline: Tribal Heritage Trail • Sirpur • Jagdalpur • Chitrakote • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to the mesmerizing ancient heartland of Tribal India. The definitive Best Chhattisgarh Tour Package, masterfully orchestrated by TRAGUIN, guides your family across archaeological ruins and living communities preserving age-old traditions deep within vast sal forests.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This premium Chhattisgarh Family Tour delivers incomparable cultural immersion across the legendary Bastar region. Guests enjoy private transportation, handpicked heritage hotels, expert cultural guides, and exclusive village interaction permits. Route: Raipur (1N) ➔ Sirpur Excursion ➔ Jagdalpur / Bastar (3N) ➔ Chitrakote (1N) ➔ Raipur Departure.

WHY CHOOSE THE PREMIUM TRIBAL CHHATTISGARH TRAIL?
Iconic Attractions: Laxman Temple Sirpur, Bastar Palace, Chitrakote Falls, Kotumsar Caves. Most Searched Experiences: Weekly tribal haats, lost-wax metal casting, Maria tribal dance. Best Time: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: CG-006 | Tribal Heritage Sirpur Jagdalpur Chitrakote | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days tribal heritage tour (CG-006 / TG-CG-THT-006): Sirpur, Bastar haats, Kotumsar Caves, Chitrakote boat ride, and 4-tier hotels.

highlights.text: Raipur to Sirpur Laxman Temple and Buddhist monasteries on Day 01
Raipur to Jagdalpur via Kondagaon Dhonkra workshop on Day 02
Weekly tribal haats and Anthropological Museum on Day 03
Kotumsar Caves and Tirathgarh Cascades on Day 04
Chitrakote Falls boat ride and illuminated dinner on Day 05
Chitrakote to Raipur departure on Day 06

days.title: RAIPUR TO SIRPUR — ARCHAEOLOGICAL MARVELS & ANCIENT MONASTERIES
days.description: Arrive at Raipur and board your luxury SUV toward historical Sirpur on the Mahanadi River. Explore the magnificent Laxman Temple with your private scholar guide, then Anand Prabhu Kudi Vihar Buddhist ruins. Drive back to Raipur for a handpicked premium resort stay and gourmet regional dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sirpur Archeological Complex, Laxman Brick Temple, Buddhist Monastic ruins.
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Resort, Raipur.
Meals Included: Welcome Signature Drink & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: RAIPUR TO JAGDALPUR — JOURNEY INTO THE BASTAR TRIBAL KINGDOM
days.description: Drive south toward Jagdalpur through Keshkal Ghats. Stop at Kondagaon for a TRAGUIN Signature interactive tour inside a family workshop demonstrating Dhonkra Bell-Metal casting. Check into authentic heritage hotel properties in Jagdalpur.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Keshkal Ghats drive, Kondagaon Dhonkra metal craft village.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Heritage Hotel, Jagdalpur.
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast & Traditional Bastar Palace-style Dinner.

days.title: JAGDALPUR — WEEKLY TRIBAL HAATS & ANTHROPOLOGICAL TREASURES
days.description: Visit the Anthropological Museum, then access a colorful weekly Bastar Haat with your local guide among Gond, Maria, and Bhatra tribes trading forest honey and handcrafted works. View Bastar Palace architecture before an evening of relaxation at your premium resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Bastar Anthropological Museum, Weekly Tribal Market, Jagdalpur Royal Palace.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Heritage Hotel, Jagdalpur.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Multi-cuisine Fine Dining Dinner.

days.title: KANGER VALLEY — SUBTERRANEAN CAVES & TIRATHGARH CASCADES
days.description: Drive into Kanger Valley National Park to Kotumsar Caves with specialized headlamps viewing stalactites and blind cave-fish pools. Visit Tirathgarh Waterfalls splitting into multiple steps over rugged stone. Enjoy a prepared outdoor family picnic lunch near terracotta artisan clusters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kotumsar Caves, Tirathgarh Waterfalls, Terracotta artisan village.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Heritage Hotel, Jagdalpur.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Custom Picnic Lunch & Regional Dinner.

days.title: JAGDALPUR TO CHITRAKOTE — THE MAGNIFICENT NIAGARA OF INDIA
days.description: Drive to Chitrakote Waterfalls and check into a luxury riverside eco-resort. Enjoy a TRAGUIN Signature private boat ride along the calm lower river pool. Watch illuminated waterfalls from premium viewing decks during a grand farewell celebration dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chitrakote Horseshoe Falls, Indravati Riverfront viewpoints.
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Riverside Eco-Resort, Chitrakote.
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast, Riverside Lunch & Grand Farewell Dinner.

days.title: CHITRAKOTE TO RAIPUR — DEPARTURE WITH TIMELESS MEMORIES
days.description: Late relaxing breakfast on your veranda overlooking Chitrakote Falls mist. Return drive to Raipur with elegant highway lunch before airport or railway departure.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Return scenic drive, private departure transfer.
Meals Included: Premium Buffet Breakfast & Farewell Highway Lunch.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 05 Nights elite accommodation at handpicked properties.
Gourmet Dining: Daily breakfast and customized dinners.
Luxury Transportation: Private AC Luxury SUV with dedicated chauffeur.
Elite Guiding: Government-approved local historians and cultural guides.
TRAGUIN Signatures: Private boat excursion at Chitrakote and Dhonkra demonstration.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated virtual concierge support.
Commercial flights or train fares to and from Raipur.
Monument fees, camera permits, personal expenses.
